phrases.literal_en: Feeling the fingertips resting at the ends of my hair

phrases.zh: 记住望着我坚定的双眼
phrases.literal_en: Remembering the determined eyes looking at me
phrases.text: Remembering determined eyes looking at me

phrases.zh: 也许已经没有明天
phrases.literal_en: Perhaps there is no tomorrow left

phrases.zh: 漂浮在一片无奈

phrases.zh: 缘份让我们相遇乱世以外
